fields.name: Lead
fields.description: Lead name (First Last)

fields.name: Databowl Lead ID
fields.description: Unique Databowl identifier - key for API sync

fields.name: Lead Status
fields.description: Databowl lead status

fields.name: Email
fields.description: Lead email address

fields.name: Lead Date
fields.description: When the lead was submitted

fields.name: Date
fields.description: When the lead was submitted

fields.name: LLID
fields.description: Leads.io lead ID

fields.name: Source
fields.description: Lead source / mapping name

fields.name: ⚙️ Lead Period
fields.description: Period derived from calendar week (W1-W4=P1, W5-W8=P2, etc.)

fields.name: ⚙️ Lead Week
fields.description: ISO calendar week from Lead Date

fields.name: ⚙️ Called?
fields.description: Has the lead been called at least once?

fields.name: ⚙️ Days to First Call
fields.description: Days between Lead Date and first call

fields.name: Time lead has been called (single select)
Lead open/closed (auto)
fields.description: Computed from Adversus Lead Status lookup. Prefer this over the manual single-select field.

options.formula: IF(OR(SEARCH("Not interested", ARRAYJOIN({fld0XrXF3YtWqWSAN})), SEARCH("Invalid", ARRAYJOIN({fld0XrXF3YtWqWSAN})), SEARCH("Success", ARRAYJOIN({fld0XrXF3YtWqWSAN})), SEARCH("Unqualified", ARRAYJOIN({fld0XrXF3YtWqWSAN}))), "Closed ", "Open ")

fields.name: Lead
fields.description: Text version of lead ID

fields.name: Databowl Lead ID
fields.description: Databowl lead ID number

fields.name: LLID
fields.description: Leads.io Lead ID

fields.name: Lead Date
fields.description: Date/time the lead was created in Databowl

fields.name: Lead Status
fields.description: Accepted / Client Rejected

fields.name: Source
fields.description: Lead source from Databowl

fields.name: Dog Age
fields.description: Dog age range

fields.name: Dog Weight
fields.description: Dog weight range

fields.name: 🔗 Adversus Calls
fields.description: Links UK leads to their Adversus call records. Matched by Databowl Lead ID via automation.

fields.name: ⚙️ Lead Period
fields.description: Which 4-week period the lead was generated in. Set by automation based on Lead Date.

fields.name: ⚙️ Lead Week
fields.description: ISO week the lead was generated in. Set by automation based on Lead Date.

fields.name: ⚙️ Called?
fields.description: Whether this lead has been called at least once via Adversus. Set by automation.

fields.name: Lead open/closed
fields.description: Normalized open/closed status for lead attempt reporting. Populated by Lead Attempts Summary refresh script.

options.formula: IF(ISERROR("W" & FLOOR((DATETIME_DIFF({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, DATETIME_PARSE("2025-12-29", 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'days')/7)+1)), BLANK(), "W" & FLOOR((DATETIME_DIFF({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, DATETIME_PARSE("2025-12-29", 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'days')/7)+1))

IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-01-27"), "P1",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-02-24"), "P2",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-03-24"), "P3",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-04-21"), "P4",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-05-19"), "P5",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-06-16"), "P6",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-07-14"), "P7",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-08-11"), "P8",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-09-08"), "P9",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-10-06"), "P10",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-11-03"), "P11",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-12-01"), "P12",
IF(
  IS_BEFORE({fldMfxuExC2ZPkFdB}, "2025-12-29"), "P13",
  "P1 2026"
)))))))))))))

fields.name: Day Name
fields.description: Displays the full name of the day (e.g., Monday) from the timestamp field.

fields.name: Day Name (Number)
fields.description: Displays the full name of the day (e.g., Monday) from the timestamp field.

fields.name: Hour of Day
fields.description: Displays the hour (0-23) from the timestamp field.

options.formula:
SWITCH(
  {fldQwzwzAVTHcS6jN},
  "BNB_Leads.io_TikTok_Lead_Ads", "Leads.io",
  "BNB Leads.io List", "Leads.io",
  "BNB Leads.io TikTok", "Leads.io",
  "BNB Dogmates 3", "Internal",
  "BNB_MonEx_Generic", "Money Expert",
  "BNB_CRM_5", "TDP",
  "BNB_D2D_1", "Credico",
  "BNB_MonEx_CB", "Money Expert",
  "Unknown"
)

SWITCH(
  {fldQwzwzAVTHcS6jN},
  "BNB_Leads.io_TikTok_Lead_Ads", "Tiktok Lead Ads",
  "BNB Leads.io List", "Meta",
  "BNB Leads.io TikTok", "Tiktok",
  "BNB Dogmates 3", "Email",
  "BNB_MonEx_Generic", "Email",
  "BNB_CRM_5", "Email",
  "BNB_D2D_1", "D2D",
  "BNB_MonEx_CB", "Email",
  "Unknown"
)
